sourceStatus.publicationPolicy: No long SEC source text is embedded; evidence uses short digests and source URL anchors.

summaryKo.oneLine: 매출 1,031억 5,000만 달러를 기록하며 북미 제약 및 종양학 부문의 견조한 성장세가 전체 실적을 견인했습니다.

keyPoints.text: 북미 제약 부문 매출은 864억 8,100만 달러로 전년 동기 대비 8 % 성장하며 핵심 수익원으로서의 지위를 공고히 했습니다.
기술 서비스 운영 모델 현대화를 위한 기업 전반의 구조조정 비용으로 6,300만 달러를 지출하여 효율성 개선을 추진 중입니다.

riskChanges.text: 주식 환매 시 발생하는 소비세 등 규제 및 세무적 요인이 자본 배분 전략과 주주 환원 규모에 영향을 미칠 수 있습니다.
주요 경영진의 Rule 10b5-1 거래 계획에 따른 자사주 매각이 예정되어 있으며, 이는 주식 유동성 및 시장 심리에 변수로 작용할 수 있습니다.

businessChanges.text: Core Ventures 및 PRISM Vision 인수와 관련하여 7억 달러 및 2,500만 달러 규모의 상환 가능한 비지배지분을 신규 인식했습니다.

financialHighlights.text: 분기 매출 1,031억 5,000만 달러, 영업이익 14억 700만 달러, 순이익 11억 1,000만 달러를 달성했습니다.
총자산 841억 6,000만 달러와 현금및현금성자산 40억 400만 달러를 보유하여 안정적인 재무 유동성을 유지하고 있습니다.

watchItems.text: 종양학 부문의 높은 성장세가 지속되는 가운데, 구조조정 비용 지출이 향후 영업이익률 개선으로 이어질지 여부를 모니터링해야 합니다.

r Executive Vice President and Chief Strategy and Business Development Officer, adopted a Rule 10b5-1 trading arrangement for the sale of up to 4,092 shares of the Company’s common stock. The duration of the trading arrangement is until August 19, 2026 , or earlier if all transactions under the trading arrangement are completed or if the trading arrangement is otherwise terminated according to its terms. The trading arrangement was entered into during an open trading window period and Mr. Rodgers represented to us that he intended for it to satisfy the requirements for the affirmative defense of Rule 10b5-1(c) of the Exchange Act. The number of shares subject to the arrangement includes shares that may be withheld by the Company to satisfy income tax withholding and remittance obligations in connection with the net settlement of equity awards. Management’s Discussion and Analysis of Financial Condition and Results of Operations in Part II of our 2025 Annual Report. Restructuring Initiatives We recorded restructuring, impairment, and related charges of $63 million and $171 million for the three months ended September 30, 2025 and 2024, respectively, and $110 million and $181 million for the six months ended September 30, 2025 and 2024, respectively. These charges were included in “Restructuring, impairment, and related charges, net” in the Condensed Consolidated Statements of Operations. Net Income Attributable to Noncontrolling Interests Net income attributable to noncontrolling interests for the three and six months ended September 30, 2025 and 2024 primarily represents the proportionate results of third-party equity interests in ClarusONE Sourcing Services LLP, Vantage Oncology Holdings, LLC, and SCRI Oncology, LLC. Noncontrolling interests with redemption features, such as put rights, that are not solely within our control are considered redeemable noncontrolling interests. During the six months ended September 30, 2025, we initially recognized redeemable noncontrolling interests of $700 million and $25 million related to our acquisitions of Core Ventures and PRISM Vision, respectively.
